name: Hot'n Spicy Bbq'd Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Gravy Master or Kitchen Bouquet
Bamboo skewers - soaked 30 minutes in water to cover
recipeInstructions:
1. In a zip-lock plastic bag, pour marinade over the shrimp.
2. Close the bag and refrigerate for 24 hours, turning several times.
3. Remove the shrimp from the marinade and drain.
4. Thread the shrimp onto skewers with lemon wedges.
5. Broil/grill at 4 to 5 inches from the heat source for 3 to 5 minutes, turning and basting frequently until the shrimp are cooked through.
6. Do not overcook!
7. Serve immediately with any remaining marinade. Makes 6 servings.
